pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-S-007 (Data Quality/Skill) excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.433, highest: DDaT at 0.433). Domain prior: out. Core hits: 0. OOS hits: 0. pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.433, and Data Quality (DQ) handling.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Data Quality KSA (composite 0.433)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Records Manager job postings does not surface this Data Quality competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
